use_cases: AI prompt input with visual glow feedback for creative tools
Text input for chatbot interfaces requiring visual flair
Search bar with ambient light effects for modern SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A visually striking text input component featuring animated orange light trails on both sides that respond to focus states. Built with Framer Motion for smooth spring animations and Lucide React icons, this prompt-style input uses a pill-shaped dark container with glass-morphism glow effects. Ideal for AI-powered applications, creative tools, and modern SaaS interfaces requiring engaging input interactions.
